name_cn:
OnTheGo Small Series | CODE:M45779
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for full-grain leather this season in the OnTheGo Small series
The OnTheGo Small tote bag draws inspiration from the classic 1968 Sac Plat handbag, featuring a miniature version in Monogram Empreinte leather with a pressed Medium Bicolor Monogram pattern, capable of holding daily essentials like an iPad Mini. Flexible handles and a detachable shoulder strap offer various carrying options.
